Characterization of NPs based on DSC evaluation
Evaluation of Mangiferin and P 80 MNG PLGA NPs were completed through DSC.
Mangiferin showed one endothermic peak at 257.4 °C which is distinguishing peak
for crystallinity of Mangiferin (Fig. 4A). P 80 MNG PLGA NPs have given a peak
at 163.9 °C (Fig. 4B). There was no peak of MNG, which is clear examination that
MNG had entrapped inside the core of opt-NPs (Fig. 4B).
Stability of P 80 MNG PLGA NPs evaluations
